title: Икар — мотивация vs дисциплина
style: Flat minimalist vector mascot style, same character design, proportions, dark teal background and warm palette as the reference image(s). Vertical 9:16, full body, centered, no text, clean bold shapes.

scenes.image: the young mortal youth excitedly strapping on big feathered wax wings, huge confident grin, full of energy, his little flame creature burning big and bright with sparks
scenes.motion: wings rustle, the little flame flickers and grows brighter, warm sparks rise
scenes.caption: День 1: мотивация на максимуме

scenes.image: the young mortal with feathered wax wings flying high up in the sky toward a huge blazing bright sun, euphoric and overconfident, soaring too high
scenes.motion: soaring upward, wings flapping slowly, clouds drift, the big sun glows
scenes.vo: Ты делаешь всё сразу. Летишь выше и выше.
scenes.caption: Делаешь ВСЁ сразу

scenes.image: dramatic, too close to the blazing sun, the mortal's wax wings are melting, feathers scattering in the air, the youth falling down, his little flame creature shrunk small and dim
scenes.motion: wax melts, feathers fall, the character drifts downward, the flame shrinks
scenes.vo: Но мотивация — это воск. Она тает. И ты падаешь.
scenes.caption: Мотивация = воск. Она тает

scenes.image: Prometheus the bearded titan in a toga steadies the fallen young mortal and hands him a small but steady bright flame creature; the youth stands calm and determined, taking a small confident step
scenes.motion: calm steady motion, the small flame glows warm and bright, gentle reassuring
scenes.vo: Дисциплина — это камень. Начни мало, но каждый день.
scenes.caption: Дисциплина = камень
